codeSystems.name: ActionCardinalityBehavior
codeSystems.title: Action Cardinality Behavior
codeSystems.description: Defines behavior for an action or a group for how many times that item may be repeated.

codeSystems.name: ActionConditionKind
codeSystems.title: Action Condition Kind
codeSystems.description: Defines the kinds of conditions that can appear on actions.

codeSystems.name: ActionGroupingBehavior
codeSystems.title: Action Grouping Behavior
codeSystems.description: Defines organization behavior of a group.

codeSystems.name: ActionParticipantType
codeSystems.title: Action Participant Type
codeSystems.description: The type of participant for the action.

codeSystems.name: ActionPrecheckBehavior
codeSystems.title: Action Precheck Behavior
codeSystems.description: Defines selection frequency behavior for an action or group.

codeSystems.name: ActionRelationshipType
codeSystems.title: Action Relationship Type
codeSystems.description: Defines the types of relationships between actions.

codeSystems.name: ActionRequiredBehavior
codeSystems.title: Action Required Behavior
codeSystems.description: Defines expectations around whether an action or action group is required.

codeSystems.name: ActionSelectionBehavior
codeSystems.title: Action Selection Behavior
codeSystems.description: Defines selection behavior of a group.

codeSystems.name: ObservationStatus
codeSystems.title: Observation Status
codeSystems.description: Codes providing the status of an observation.

codeSystems.name: PublicationStatus

codeSystems.name: RequestIntent

codeSystems.description: Codes indicating the degree of authority/intentionality associated with a request.

codeSystems.name: RequestPriority

codeSystems.name: RequestStatus
codeSystems.title: RequestStatus
codeSystems.description: Codes identifying the lifecycle stage of a request.

codeSystems.name: ResourceType
codeSystems.title: ResourceType
codeSystems.description: One of the resource types defined as part of this version of FHIR.

codeSystems.name: TreatmentLineCS
codeSystems.title: Treatment Line Code System
codeSystems.description:
Ordinal codes representing the line of systemic anti-cancer therapy.
These codes are used in the TreatmentLineVS value set and on the LineOfTherapyObservation
and regimen profiles.

**mCODE Migration Candidate** — These codes are proposed for adoption in mCODE STU5
or as a SNOMED CT extension request. Once standard codes are available, this code
system should be deprecated.

codeSystems.name: LOINC
codeSystems.title: Logical Observation Identifiers, Names and Codes (LOINC)
codeSystems.description: LOINC provides a set of universal names and ID codes for identifying laboratory and clinical test results.1,2 LOINC facilitates the exchange and pooling of results, such as blood hemoglobin, serum potassium, or vital signs, for clinical care, outcomes management, and research. LOINC's universal identifiers (names and codes) can be used in the context of order and observation exchanges between information systems that use syntax standards such as HL73, CEN TC251, ISO TC215, ASTM4, and DICOM. Specifically, the identifier can be used as the coded value for an observation in any other standard that uses the observation/observation value paradigm, whether messages, documents, application programming interface (API), etc. For example, LOINC codes are used widely in the OBX segment Observation Identifier field (OBX-3) of an ORU HL7 (HL7 version 2.x or ASTM 1238-9410) message that may be sent between a Clinical Laboratory Information Management Systems (LIMS) and Electronic Health Record Systems (EHR).5, 6 In this way, LOINC codes provide universal identifiers that allow the exchange of clinical data between heterogeneous computing environments.

codeSystems.name: SNOMED_CT
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT (all versions)
codeSystems.description: SNOMED CT is the most comprehensive and precise clinical health terminology product in the world, owned and distributed around the world by The International Health Terminology Standards Development Organisation (IHTSDO).
codeSystems.http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/valueset-referenc: Observation Reference Range Applies To Codes

codeSystems.name: ActionType
codeSystems.title: ActionType
codeSystems.description: The type of action to be performed.

codeSystems.name: DataAbsentReason
codeSystems.title: DataAbsentReason
codeSystems.description: Used to specify why the normally expected content of the data element is missing.

codeSystems.name: DefinitionTopic
codeSystems.title: DefinitionTopic
codeSystems.description: High-level categorization of the definition, used for searching, sorting, and filtering.

codeSystems.name: GoalCategory
codeSystems.title: Goal category
codeSystems.description: Codes for grouping goals to use for filtering or presentation.

codeSystems.name: GoalPriority
codeSystems.title: Goal priority
codeSystems.description: Indicates the level of importance associated with reaching or sustaining a goal.

codeSystems.name: ObservationCategoryCodes
codeSystems.title: Observation Category Codes
codeSystems.description: Observation Category codes.

codeSystems.name: PlanDefinitionType
codeSystems.title: PlanDefinitionType
codeSystems.description: The type of PlanDefinition.

codeSystems.name: ObservationReferenceRangeMeaningCodes
codeSystems.title: Observation Reference Range Meaning Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the meaning/use of a reference range for a particular target population.

codeSystems.name: ObservationInterpretation
codeSystems.title: ObservationInterpretation
codeSystems.description: One or more codes providing a rough qualitative interpretation of the observation, such as "normal" / "abnormal", "low" / "high", "better" / "worse", "resistant" / "susceptible", "expected" / "not expected". The value set is intended to be for ANY use where coded representation of an interpretation is needed.

codeSystems.name: Ietf3066
codeSystems.title: Tags for the Identification of Languages
codeSystems.description: Older value from OID registry.  Superceded; see recommendations in BCP-47.

codeSystems.name: ISO3166Part1
codeSystems.title: ISO 3166-1 Codes for the representation of names of countries and their subdivisions — Part 1: Country code
codeSystems.description: ISO 3166-1 establishes codes that represent the current names of countries, dependencies, and other areas of particular geopolitical interest, on the basis of country names obtained from the United Nations.

codeSystems.name: ISO3166Part2
codeSystems.title: ISO 3166-2 Codes for the representation of names of countries and their subdivisions — Part 2: Country subdivision code
codeSystems.description: ISO 3166-2 establishes a code that represents the names of the principal administrative divisions, or similar areas, of the countries and entities included in ISO 3166-1.
